changes.value:
## What

Implement `workspace_symbol_live` ŌĆö live workspace symbol search via LSP. Supplements the existing indexed `search_symbol` op. Finds symbols the indexer hasn't reached yet or in files that changed since last index.

### `workspace_symbol_live` ŌĆö `workspace/symbol`
- New file: `swissarmyhammer-code-context/src/ops/workspace_symbol_live.rs`
- Takes `LspContext` + `WorkspaceSymbolLiveOptions { query, max_results }`
- Sends `workspace/symbol` request with the query string
- Parses `SymbolInformation[]` response
- Converts to existing `SymbolLocation` type (reuse from `get_symbol.rs`) for consistency with indexed results
- No special enrichment needed ŌĆö this IS the live data

### MCP registration
- Add to `code_context` tool as `workspace symbol live` operation
- Note: this is distinct from existing `search symbol` (which queries the index)

### Files to create/modify
- `swissarmyhammer-code-context/src/ops/workspace_symbol_live.rs` ŌĆö new
- `swissarmyhammer-code-context/src/ops/mod.rs` ŌĆö re-export
- `swissarmyhammer-code-context/src/lib.rs` ŌĆö re-export
- `swissarmyhammer-tools/src/mcp/tools/code_context/mod.rs` ŌĆö registration + handler

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Returns live symbol search results from the LSP server
- [ ] Results use the same `SymbolLocation` type as indexed `search_symbol` for consistency
- [ ] Respects `max_results` limit
- [ ] Works even when the index is empty or stale
- [ ] Appears as MCP operation under `code_context` tool

## Tests
- [ ] Unit test: `workspace/symbol` response parsing (SymbolInformation format)
- [ ] Unit test: conversion to `SymbolLocation` type
- [ ] Unit test: `max_results` truncation
- [ ] Integration test: missing LSP client returns error
- [ ] `cargo nextest run -p swissarmyhammer-code-context` passes

## Workflow
- Use `/tdd` ŌĆö write failing tests first, then implement to make them pass.

#lsp-live

changes.forward_patch:
--- original
+++ modified
@@ -1,18 +1,17 @@
 ## What

-Implement `workspace_symbol_live` ŌĆö live workspace symbol search via LSP. Supplements the existing indexed `search_symbol` op. Finds symbols the indexer hasn't reached yet or in files that changed since last index.
+Implement `workspace_symbol_live` ŌĆö live workspace symbol search via LSP. Uses layered resolution. Supplements the existing indexed `search_symbol` op.

-### `workspace_symbol_live` ŌĆö `workspace/symbol`
+### `workspace_symbol_live` ŌĆö layered
 - New file: `swissarmyhammer-code-context/src/ops/workspace_symbol_live.rs`
-- Takes `LspContext` + `WorkspaceSymbolLiveOptions { query, max_results }`
-- Sends `workspace/symbol` request with the query string
-- Parses `SymbolInformation[]` response
-- Converts to existing `SymbolLocation` type (reuse from `get_symbol.rs`) for consistency with indexed results
-- No special enrichment needed ŌĆö this IS the live data
+- Takes `LayeredContext` + `WorkspaceSymbolLiveOptions { query, max_results }`
+- **Layer 1 (live LSP)**: `workspace/symbol` request. Most current ŌĆö finds symbols the indexer hasn't reached yet.
+- **Layer 2 (LSP index)**: Query `lsp_symbols` with fuzzy name match. This is essentially what existing `search_symbol` does.
+- **Layer 3 (tree-sitter)**: Query `ts_chunks` for symbol names matching the query. Basic but always available.
+- Returns results using the existing `SymbolLocation` type for consistency with indexed search.

-### MCP registration
-- Add to `code_context` tool as `workspace symbol live` operation
-- Note: this is distinct from existing `search symbol` (which queries the index)
+### Design note
+This op and the existing `search_symbol` could potentially be merged ŌĆö `search_symbol` could itself become layered, trying live LSP first and falling back to index. Consider whether this should replace `search_symbol` rather than being a separate op. If kept separate, the distinction is: `search_symbol` = index query (fast, offline), `workspace_symbol_live` = tries live first (most current).

 ### Files to create/modify
 - `swissarmyhammer-code-context/src/ops/workspace_symbol_live.rs` ŌĆö new
@@ -21,17 +20,18 @@
 - `swissarmyhammer-tools/src/mcp/tools/code_context/mod.rs` ŌĆö registration + handler

 ## Acceptance Criteria
-- [ ] Returns live symbol search results from the LSP server
-- [ ] Results use the same `SymbolLocation` type as indexed `search_symbol` for consistency
+- [ ] Returns live symbol results when LSP daemon running
+- [ ] Falls back to LSP index symbol query when no live LSP
+- [ ] Falls back to tree-sitter chunk symbols as last resort
+- [ ] Results use `SymbolLocation` type for consistency with `search_symbol`
 - [ ] Respects `max_results` limit
-- [ ] Works even when the index is empty or stale
 - [ ] Appears as MCP operation under `code_context` tool

 ## Tests
 - [ ] Unit test: `workspace/symbol` response parsing (SymbolInformation format)
-- [ ] Unit test: conversion to `SymbolLocation` type
+- [ ] Unit test: fallback to LSP index query
+- [ ] Unit test: fallback to tree-sitter symbols
 - [ ] Unit test: `max_results` truncation
-- [ ] Integration test: missing LSP client returns error
 - [ ] `cargo nextest run -p swissarmyhammer-code-context` passes

 ## Workflow

changes.forward_patch:
--- original
+++ modified
@@ -1,17 +1,17 @@
 ## What

-Implement `workspace_symbol_live` ŌĆö live workspace symbol search via LSP. Uses layered resolution. Supplements the existing indexed `search_symbol` op.
+Implement `workspace_symbol_live` ŌĆö live workspace symbol search. Uses layered resolution via `LayeredContext`.

 ### `workspace_symbol_live` ŌĆö layered
 - New file: `swissarmyhammer-code-context/src/ops/workspace_symbol_live.rs`
-- Takes `LayeredContext` + `WorkspaceSymbolLiveOptions { query, max_results }`
-- **Layer 1 (live LSP)**: `workspace/symbol` request. Most current ŌĆö finds symbols the indexer hasn't reached yet.
-- **Layer 2 (LSP index)**: Query `lsp_symbols` with fuzzy name match. This is essentially what existing `search_symbol` does.
-- **Layer 3 (tree-sitter)**: Query `ts_chunks` for symbol names matching the query. Basic but always available.
-- Returns results using the existing `SymbolLocation` type for consistency with indexed search.
+- Takes `&LayeredContext` + `WorkspaceSymbolLiveOptions { query, max_results }`
+- **Layer 1 (live LSP)**: `ctx.lsp_request("workspace/symbol", ...)`. Most current ŌĆö finds symbols the indexer hasn't reached yet.
+- **Layer 2 (LSP index)**: `ctx.lsp_symbols_by_name(query, max_results)`. Same data as existing `search_symbol` op but accessed through `LayeredContext`.
+- **Layer 3 (tree-sitter)**: `ctx.ts_chunks_matching(query, max_results)`. Basic text matching against chunk symbol names.
+- Returns `SymbolLocation` type for consistency with indexed search.

 ### Design note
-This op and the existing `search_symbol` could potentially be merged ŌĆö `search_symbol` could itself become layered, trying live LSP first and falling back to index. Consider whether this should replace `search_symbol` rather than being a separate op. If kept separate, the distinction is: `search_symbol` = index query (fast, offline), `workspace_symbol_live` = tries live first (most current).
+Consider whether this should eventually replace `search_symbol` rather than coexist. With `LayeredContext`, `search_symbol` is just "layer 2 only" ŌĆö this op adds layers 1 and 3. For now, keep separate; merge later when existing ops migrate to `LayeredContext`.

 ### Files to create/modify
 - `swissarmyhammer-code-context/src/ops/workspace_symbol_live.rs` ŌĆö new
@@ -20,17 +20,16 @@
 - `swissarmyhammer-tools/src/mcp/tools/code_context/mod.rs` ŌĆö registration + handler

 ## Acceptance Criteria
-- [ ] Returns live symbol results when LSP daemon running
-- [ ] Falls back to LSP index symbol query when no live LSP
-- [ ] Falls back to tree-sitter chunk symbols as last resort
-- [ ] Results use `SymbolLocation` type for consistency with `search_symbol`
-- [ ] Respects `max_results` limit
-- [ ] Appears as MCP operation under `code_context` tool
+- [ ] Returns live results via `ctx.lsp_request()` when available
+- [ ] Falls back to `ctx.lsp_symbols_by_name()` when no live LSP
+- [ ] Falls back to `ctx.ts_chunks_matching()` as last resort
+- [ ] Results use `SymbolLocation`/`SymbolInfo` type
+- [ ] Respects `max_results`

 ## Tests
 - [ ] Unit test: `workspace/symbol` response parsing (SymbolInformation format)
-- [ ] Unit test: fallback to LSP index query
-- [ ] Unit test: fallback to tree-sitter symbols
+- [ ] Unit test: fallback to `lsp_symbols_by_name()`
+- [ ] Unit test: fallback to `ts_chunks_matching()`
 - [ ] Unit test: `max_results` truncation
 - [ ] `cargo nextest run -p swissarmyhammer-code-context` passes
